rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Demurrer Of Gene Smiths To John Reeds Petition To Discover Estate Assets And Compel Accounting Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Gene Smith's Demurrer to John Reed's Petition to Discover Estate Assets and Compel Accounting Thereof is mooted by the filing of the First Amended Petition to Discover Estate Assets and Compel Accounting on December 29, 2015. The prevailing party shall prepare a proposed order.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RICHARD G. MENDRIBIL TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To The Amended Petition To Remove Richard Mendribil, Jr., As Successor Trustee For Breach Of Trust; To Compel Richard Mendribil, Jr. To Report And For First And Final Accounting; For Appointment Of New Trustee; And To Transfer The Place Of Administration Of Trust
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Richard Mendribil, Jr.'s Demurrer to the Amended Petition to Remove Richard Mendribil, Jr. as Successor Trustee for Breach of Trust; to Compel Richard Mendribil, Jr. to Report and for First and Final Accounting; for Appointment of New Trustee; and to Transfer the Principal Place of Administration of Trust ("the Amended Petition") is CONTINUED to February 11, 2016 at 2 p.m. Prior to that hearing, the parties shall notify the Court whether the January 25, 2016 hearing in Arizona Superior Court and developments therefrom obviate the need for a future hearing on this matter.
